title: Support chat accept + remote desktop in chat
description:
Two regressions after the tenant-routing chat fixes: when a customer accepted a chat invite, the admin stayed on "Waiting for accept" and never saw the live chat open. Also, the remote desktop / remote help controls were missing from the chat window toolbar.

Admin chat sync no longer wipes the waiting UI when /chat/active briefly returns empty — it re-checks the local session id via /chat/messages and keeps the accept poll running. chat-response SSE now uses stable user-id matching so the admin transition to active chat is reliable. Customers see the Remote help toolbar button again after accept; admins get a Remote desktop button in the chat header to start or reopen a remote session with the customer in chat.

Who is affected: PipeShare support chat and remote assistance on the private OVH server (pipeshare.live). SaaS when the next platform version is applied in cPanel releases.
changeLog: Admin chat opens when customer accepts — SSE and poll no longer drop the session.
Admin chat sync keeps waiting UI until session is confirmed ended.
Customer Remote help button restored in chat toolbar after accept.
Admin Remote desktop button added to chat toolbar during active chat.
Stable user-id matching on chat-response and remote-help events.
